{{CargoRelic
|name=Hamster Specimen
|class_id=20448
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=This lifelike specimen is the preserved carcass of a hamster gained from the species war. It's an incidental result of the snails' research on Hamster physiology. It's not just an accurate replica of a hamster exterior, but a graphic presentation of the internal organs of hamsters, which helps snails understand hamsters better and develop better strategies against hamsters!
|fame=31
|art=12
|fth=18
|civ=16
|tech=12
|ss1=Against Hamsters, Troop Casualty -1%
|ss2=Against Hamsters, Troop Casualty -2%
|ss3=Against Hamsters, Troop Casualty -3%
|ss4=Against Hamsters, Troop Casualty -3%
|ss7=Against Hamsters, Troop Casualty -3%<br> (Awakened)
}}
